title: Add Employees to Departing Employee Watchlist
content:
Loops through stand-down tickets provided by the Departing Employee Auto-Add playbook and adds employees to the Departing Employee watchlist in Code42 Incydr.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Code42 pack (Code42, partner-supported).

Inputs — ticket_username: The username (in email format) provided in a stand-down ticket from Jira, Zendesk, etc.; ticket_departure_date: The departure date (in YYYY-MM-DD format) provided in a stand-down ticket from Jira, Zendesk, etc..

Integrations/scripts used: Code42, Set.
raw_yaml:
id: Add Employees to Departing Employee Watchlist

fromversion: "6.8.0"
name: Add Employees to Departing Employee Watchlist
description: Loops through stand-down tickets provided by the Departing Employee Auto-Add
  playbook and adds employees to the Departing Employee watchlist in Code42 Incydr.
tags:
- Code42 Incydr
